# Q 

2 

M 

FABRICCLEANER

## Interior / maintenance

### Effective cleaner for automotive fabrics and textiles.

Q²M FabricCleaner is a dedicated cleaner developed for automotive fabrics and textile surfaces. It removes dirt, stains and everyday contamination from seats, carpets and fabric trim while remaining safe for regular use.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_fabriccleaner_1000_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Strong and effective textile cleaner and pre-spray.

Q²M FabricCleaner helps restore the clean appearance of fabric surfaces by lifting embedded dirt and grime. It prepares textiles for further protection while keeping the material fresh and free from residues.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons43.svg)

NO FOAM 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons73.svg)

STRONG CLEANING ACTION 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons20.svg)

FOR ALL TEXTILES 

what makes

Q2M FABRICCLEANER so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/fabriccleaner-5-min-683x1024.jpg)

Removes dirt and stains from fabric surfaces

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/fabriccleaner-2-min-683x1024.jpg)

Prepares fabrics for protection if required

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mfabriccleaner.webp)

CAPACITIES 

1000 ML

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

FABRICCLEANER

01
Vacuum the fabric surface before application. 

02
Spray Q²M FabricCleaner onto the surface or a brush. 

03
Agitate gently to loosen contamination. 

04
Wipe or extract residue using a clean towel. 

05
Allow the surface to dry completely. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What surfaces can Q²M FabricCleaner be used on? 

Seats, carpets and automotive fabric trim.

02
Is it safe for regular use? 

Yes. It is suitable for routine fabric maintenance.

03
Does it leave residue behind? 

No. It cleans without leaving residue.

04
Should fabric be vacuumed first? 

Yes. Removing loose dirt improves results.

05
Can it be used before applying FabricCoat? 

Yes. It prepares fabrics for protection.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/5743360486545-Q-M-FabricCleaner)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
